subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness to thy faith, thy devotion, thy turning unto God, and thy humility and submissiveness before the face of God, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد بر ایمان و توجه و اقبال و خضوع و خشوع تو لوجه الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
